name: drax-plugin
description: Lean Drax organic automation runtime for founders with an existing product.

scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run validate
scripts.test:image: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 scripts/social_image.test.py; else echo "SKIP: python3 not found; social image renderer test skipped."; fi
scripts.test:video: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 scripts/social_video.test.py; else echo "SKIP: python3 or ffmpeg not found; social video renderer test skipped."; fi
scripts.test:carousel: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 scripts/social_carousel.test.py; else echo "SKIP: python3 not found; social carousel renderer test skipped."; fi
scripts.test:distribute: if node -e "require.resolve('playwright')" >/dev/null 2>&1; then node --test tests/distribute.test.mjs; else echo "SKIP: playwright not installed; distribution tests skipped."; fi

author: einstenrodrigues.dev <einstenrodrigues.dev@gmail.com>
